svg.title: Phantom Agent Framework — Full Pipeline v2
svg.desc: Four-stage pipeline: Stage 1 Observer builds fused BEV feature. Stage 2 initialises three query streams (Detect, Track, PA). Stage 3 RG-Predictor generates future BEV features via residual decomposition. Stage 4 Decoder resolves all queries into final outputs including P_exist, K-modal GMM trajectories, and t+1 ghost bbox.

g.text: Stage 1 — Observer: multi-view time-space BEV construction
① occ head on B̃ → OSZ
anchor → project to {f_l^c} → delta-update → refined feat + anchor
Global self-attention (all three query types together)
PA queries absorb scene context from visible Detect/Track queries — no hand-crafted feature needed
Stage 3 — RG-Predictor: residual-guided future BEV prediction
R̂_k → BEV space + static B̃ → coarse F̂_k
ConvGRU backward flow f_k → deformable attn offset → refined F̂_k
Stage 4 — Decoder: query resolution and output decoding
anchor + flow offset → BEV K,V → feature update per future step
PA queries compete with each other
Training: Hungarian matching on PA outputs — one GT ghost per PA query, rest supervised as background (P_exist = 0)
Skip features from Observer fused via residual → reduces Forecaster error propagation
